benchmark: FixThatPDF Q3 2026 browser PDF conversion and fidelity benchmark

tools.result: 1/1 styled-text round-trip fixture exported, reopened, and retained its detected style
tools.method: Browser regression checks text detection, placement, history, export, and parseable reopen

tools.result: 3/3 expected native pages were present in the merged regression output
tools.method: The test reopens the downloaded PDF and counts copied source pages

tools.result: 2/2 selected pages were present in the split regression output
tools.method: The test downloads the range and verifies the resulting PDF page count

tools.result: The regression output was smaller than its source fixture and remained parseable
tools.method: The browser test compares byte size and reopens the downloaded result

tools.result: The regression DOCX contained a valid Word document body and visual-fidelity fallback
tools.method: Tests inspect the OOXML package and verify the recovery path for image-only PDFs

tools.result: 1/1 expected worksheet was packaged with the fixture's structured cell content
tools.method: The regression test opens the XLSX archive and checks worksheet XML

tools.result: 1/1 expected slide and its media relationship were present in the PPTX package
tools.method: The regression test inspects slide XML and the packaged page image

tools.result: 1/1 expected responsive SVG page was created with extracted text content
tools.method: The test inspects the downloaded HTML for its SVG viewBox and page text

tools.result: The expected phrase was found in the downloaded PDF's searchable text layer
tools.method: The browser test converts the DOCX, reopens the PDF, and extracts text

tools.result: The expected Quarter Total label was found in the converted PDF
tools.method: The regression test reopens the PDF and verifies extracted table text

tools.result: The expected slide phrase was found in the converted PDF
tools.method: The regression test reopens the PDF and verifies extracted slide text

tools.result: The expected 42,000 value was searchable in the resulting PDF
tools.method: The regression test converts sanitized HTML and verifies extracted PDF text

tools.result: 1/1 JPEG fixture produced a valid one-page PDF
tools.method: The browser test creates a JPEG, converts it, and parses the downloaded PDF

tools.result: 1/1 PNG fixture produced a valid one-page PDF
tools.method: The browser test converts the PNG and parses the downloaded PDF

tools.result: 1/1 output began with the verified JPEG FF D8 signature
tools.method: The regression test downloads the image and inspects its leading bytes

tools.result: 1/1 output matched the verified PNG file signature
tools.method: The regression test downloads the image and inspects its eight-byte signature

tools.result: The known fixture text was recognized and a confidence result was reported
tools.method: The OCR regression runs locally and checks recognized text plus quality reporting

tools.result: The expected signature text was present after export and reopen
tools.method: The regression places a signature, downloads the PDF, and inspects its content

tools.result: The regression output contained an encryption dictionary and rejected an unauthenticated open
tools.method: The test inspects the PDF encryption structure and verifies password behavior

tools.result: 1/1 authorized fixture downloaded as a parseable unlocked PDF
tools.method: The browser test supplies the password and reopens the downloaded output

tools.result: The regression produced reviewable text changes and a valid marked report PDF
tools.method: Tests verify grouped changes, navigation, focused regions, and report export

interpretation: Passed means the named property was verified for the published regression fixture. It is not a promise of perfect output for every PDF.
